_publications._publicationTitle: Neuroanatomical correlates of working memory performance in Neurofibromatosis 1.

_contextSnippet: The overall Vineland adaptive functioning score was 68, well below the normative mean of 100
details: Overall Vineland adaptive functioning score was 68 (SD 13.0), well below the normative mean of 100, indicating significant adaptive functioning impairments in the NF1 sample
